summary: Unit tests comprehensively cover all core functions (parsing, license lookup, compliance checking, report generation) with explicit assertions on output counts and status labels. Workflow structure is validated including actionlint checks. However, critical gaps exist: (1) the CLI main() function is not imported or tested—error handling for missing files, invalid JSON, and exit codes (0 for compliant, 1 for denied) are untested; (2) edge cases are incomplete—malformed JSON/requirements.txt, various version specifiers (>=, <=, ~), package extras, duplicates, and case sensitivity are not covered; (3) workflow tests only verify YAML structure and syntax, not actual execution or output; (4) no end-to-end CLI integration test exists in the provided test code. The test organization is clean with good naming and pytest usage, but the suite would miss regressions in CLI error paths, exit codes, and workflow runtime behavior. The separate run_act_tests.py harness (in implementation) tests workflow execution but is not part of the test code suite provided.
